def positive_retry_on_rate_limit_without_backoff():
    rule_id = "retry_on_rate_limit_without_backoff"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Rate-limit retries appear without visible backoff or Retry-After handling."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
